comment_purpose: Codegen target list. Each entry names a consumer repo whose receiver code is grepped for PERMISSIONS.X.slug references — every match contributes the consumer's PlatformSlug to the canonical PERMISSIONS.X.validatedBy array. Generated on every version bump by .github/workflows/regenerate-validatedby.yml; consumed by scripts/regenerate-validatedby.ts.
comment_v0_1_0: Bootstrap state: zero consumers reference @rello-platform/permissions yet (Doc A Phase 2 + Phase 3 perform the import-path migration). Until then, the validatedBy values shipped in src/index.ts are inherited verbatim from api-client@v1.10.1's hand-authored snapshot. Each consumer below carries `tag: null` until they pin a real version of THIS package; codegen skips null-tagged entries.

consumers._note: Phase 2 of Doc A migrates Rello receivers from @rello-platform/api-client to @rello-platform/permissions. Pin once Rello bumps its package.json reference.
Phase 3 of Doc A migrates NS's 11 receiver call sites from string-literal permissions to PERMISSIONS.X.slug.
HH's requireIntakeBearer gates on intake:write today via api-client. Same migration as the other spokes.
Engines that receive engine:access auth are validators too — their receiver code is grepped same as spokes.
